titleStmt.title: SII 17.625: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 625. (A.R. No. 579 of 1904.) TIRUVĀRŪR, NAGAPATTINAM TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north wall of the central shrine in the Satyavāchakēśvara temple.

This inscription commences with the praśasti Pugaḻ śūlnda puṇari of KulōttuṅgaI. Though the portion containing the date is lost in the body of the grant it is stated that this grant issued in the 27th year became necessary as the endowment already made in the 26th year was found insufficient.

It records the sale of land, made tax-free, to god Tirumaṇḍaḷi-uḍaiya Mahādēva probably by the same sabhā as in No. 623 above, receiving 6(3/4) and mākāṇi kāśu endowed for offerings on specified occasions and for feeding Śivayōgis and Māhēśvaras, by Paṭṭaśā••••• [Śe]llūr-kkāri Pavaḻa-kkuṉṟu alias Nāṟpatteṇṇāyira-vannadānanangai Tāḻi-Nindi and Śellūr-kkāri Pāṟpati.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pukaḻ cūḻnta puṇari Akaḻ cūḻnta puviyil (p)pon nemiyaḷavun taṉnemi naṭappa viḷaṅku jayamakaḷai Iḷaṅkopparuvattu caṟkara koṭṭattu vikkiramattoḻilāl putumaṇam puṇarntu matuvarai viṭṭa vayirākāttu vāriyal muṉaik koṉtaḷa
varaicar tantaḷamiriya vāḷuṟai kaḻittu toḷvali kāṭṭip porppari naṭāttik kirttiyai niṟutti vaṭaticai vākai cūṭit teṉṟicai temaṟu kamalap pūmakaḷp potumaiyum ponniyāṭaiyum naṉ nilappāvaiyin tanimaiyun taviravantu punitaṟṟiru maṇimakuṭam Urimaiyiṟ cūṭi tannaṭiyiraṇṭun taṭa muṭiyākat to
ṉnila ventar cūṭa muṉṉai maṉuvāṟu peruka kaliyāṟu vaṟuppa ceṅkol ticai toṟuñ cella viṇkuṭai Irunila viḷākam veṅkaṇun=tanātu tirunila veṇṇi lāttikaḻa Oru tani meruviṟp puli viḷaiyāṭa vār kaṭaṟ ṟi(v)vāntarattup pūpālar tiṟaiviṭu tanta kalañcori kaḷiṟu muṟai niṟppa vilaṅkiya tennavan karuntalai
paruntalaittiṭat taṉ ponnakar puṟattiṭaikkiṭappa vinnāḷ piṟkulap piṟai pol niṟp piḻai Ennum colletir koṭiṟṟallatu taṉ kaivilletir koṭā vi kelletir naṅkili tuṭaṅki maṇalūr naṭuveṉat tuṅkapattiraiyaḷavuṟṟu veṅkaṇum paṭṭa veṅkaḷiṟum viṭṭa taṉ māṉamuṅ kūṟiṉa
viramuṅ kiṭappa Eṟiṉa malaikaḷum mutuku neḷippa Iḻinta(ña) natikaḷum cuḻaṉṟuṭaintoṭa viḻunta kaṭalkaḷun talaivirittalamarak kuṭaiticai tannāṭukantu tāṉuntāṉaiyum pan nāḷiṭṭap palapala mutukum payantetir māṟi veypala merun tiruvumRead jeyap peruntiruvum.paḻiyukantu kuṭutta pukaḻuñ ce
lviyum vāḷāṟoṇkaṇ maṭantayariṭṭamum miḷātu kuṭutta veṅkari niraiyum kaṅka maṇṭalamum ciṅkaṇameṉṉum yiraṇṭum Oru vicaik kaikkoṇṭiṇṭiya pukaḻoṭu pāṇṭimaṇṭalaṅkoḷḷat tiruvuḷattaṭaittu veḷḷavaru ttalaṅka lum porukari
lidevaṟku Ayanaviṣūccaṅkrān=ti nāḷukku Āḷuṭaiyāraic ciṟappamutu ceyvikkavum Aṟṟai nāḷāl civacokikaḷaiyum śrīmāheśvararkaḷaiyum Amutu ceyvikkavum piccaiyiṭavum maṭappuṟamāka Irupat
tāṟāvatu koṇṭa nilam Annimantattukkup potātāka Atukkuṭalāka 2 10 7 vatu nila nimantam ceyya Ivvūrirukkum paṭṭacā cellūrkkāri pavaḻakkunṟāṟ nāṟpat teṇṇāyira vannatāna naṅkaiyum tāḻinin=tiyum cellūr
kkāri pāṟpatiyum tirumaṇṭaḷi Uṭaiyār paṇṭārattu Oṭukkina kācil nāṅkaḷ Ādicaṇṭe śvarar pakkal koṇṭa kācu Āṟemukkāle mākāṇiyum tiruvārur nilaikkaḷattu māṟu kiṟa māṟṟuppaṭi kāconṟukkuk kuṭinaikkallāl mā
ṭai yoṭokkum pon Araikkaḻañcāka 3kkaḻañce 8 mañcāṭiyum 1 māvum koṇṭu tirumaṇṭaḷi Uṭaiya mahādevaṟku Ayanaviṣuccaṅkrāntiāṭṭu 4kkum ciṟappa mutu ceyvikkavum civacokikaḷaiyum śrīmāheśvararkaḷai
yum Amutu ceyvikkavum maṭattukku ttamākap piccaiyiṭavum maṭappuṟamāka nilanimantam ceyyac candrādittavaṟ Iṟaiyiliyāka nāṅkaḷ Ippon koṇṭu viṟṟukkuṭutta nilamā vatu Eṅkaḷurilteka Ālaṅkuḷattu
kku kiḻakkuk kāyākka nilam [ mun=tirikaik kiḻaraiye] nilattukku meṟkum tenpāṟkellai
tukku vaṭakku melpāṟkellai Āṟṟūrkuḷattukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai kaḷat tūr vāykkālukkut teṟkum Āka Ivvicaintaperunān kellaikkum naṭuvupaṭṭa kuḻi 100 3 10 3 sandhi � yināl � Innam
tevaṟkey Ipponnukku viṟṟa macakkalenṟu per kūvappaṭṭa nilam3pamakiḻakku vaṭakku kiḻpāṟkellai Ittevar nilattukku meṟkum tenpāṟkellai Ittevar nilattu vaṭakkum colaiyarai krama vi
tta nilattukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai kalitira vāykkālukkut teṟkum Āka Iv vicainta perunānkellaikku naṭuvu paṭṭa kuḻi 3 100 2 10 na ye yināl nilam 3pa makiḻakkuva lum Āka ṟamukkāle mākāṇiyā
kaḻañcey 8 mañcāṭiyu morumāvum koṇṭu candrādittavaṟ śāśvatika māka Iṟaiyiliyāka viṟṟu vilaiyāvaṇañ ceytu kuṭuttom tiruvārurt tirumaṇ ṭaḷi U[ ṭaiya mahā� na dayam putukkuṭi Uṟu Incomplete. The following lines Are Engraved In three different pieces:
vittanum Uḷḷiṭṭa sabhaiyyā [ bhai]
kamainta Uṟuppuṭṭur ra� ṭur pa
ṇiyāl livvurk karaṇattān n Aiyā
ṟanārāyaṇanen neḻuttu Ippa
ṭiyaṟiven Uṟuppuṭṭur rnir subhra ne
neḻuttu Uṟuppuṭṭur ṭṭan[ saṅjñai]
veṅkai ka mātayiṟ kramavittan sa
ṅjñaiyātanamaikku Aiyāṟanārāyaṇa
neḻuttu Uṟuppuṭṭuri na[ ka mavi]
tta neḻuttu Ippa
Iravi Ā Um ceyvitta kalliraṇṭu
Digital edition of SII 17.625 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
